horoscope: With today's Sun-Pluto square, dear Aries, there can be tensions over matters of respect, ownership, or methods. It can be a time when people are touchy, sensitive, and defensive, and they may not readily accept help or your input. You could feel you're moving in different directions or talking about entirely different things. It may be better to accept that your feelings and beliefs aren't necessarily going to align with those of others just for now, and then try to work around that. Through intense interactions, however, you might feel the motivation to be your best. As well, with some self-honesty, you might uncover desires you didn't know you had. Look for clues for how to better manage your resources.

You're in a solar cycle that's generally strong for personal appeal, attention, and power in general, dear Taurus, with the Sun in your sign. Today, however, the Sun is in discord with Pluto. Tensions, driven by pressures to perform, can rise from work or competition. It's best to identify these things and avoid letting worries take over. You want to go your own way and connect with your wants and desires, but you could feel watched or blocked temporarily. If so, list your priorities or talk things through with someone you trust to help release the pressure. Today is especially strong for insight into others' motives and desires, even if they are doing their best to keep these things to themselves.

You're in a solar cycle that's strong for pacing yourself and preventing overload, dear Gemini. Today, however, buried frustrations or fears can disrupt the flow and affect your mood as the Sun and Pluto form a square. You would be wise to address unfinished matters so guilt doesn't get in the way of healthy living. Philosophical disagreements can escalate quickly! Watch for holding on too tightly to your beliefs and customs if they're only causing frustration. Take the time to center yourself and think of better ways to handle irritating situations, as these strategies will serve your interests today and down the road.

With today's Sun-Pluto square, dear Cancer, there can be some tension, most likely about power and control. You may be conflicted about how deep your feelings for someone run. Watch for a tendency to confuse hunches with fears since there is a tendency to be overly suspicious. Your best bet is to rise above game-playing and focus on softening and moderating your impulses, even when it's very tempting to get involved. Consider that people can be temperamental under current conditions, including you! A part of you could be attracting, or attracted to, some level of drama if you are not in touch with what you truly want. As the day advances, however, it's far easier to let things be.

You're in an especially goal-oriented period, dear Leo, with the Sun currently transiting your solar tenth house. You might treat this time as a checkpoint of sorts for your performance and accomplishments. Today, close relations and career-related matters can be heavy and loaded with a Sun-Pluto square. Worries can undermine confident decision-making, and people can be stubborn. For now, it can be challenging to turn the other cheek and hard to see a direct route to your goals. Consider planning your next move rather than pushing your agenda now, when the chances of achieving your goals are temporarily low. You can work on getting your life or a relationship to a better balance as you go along.

With today's Sun-Pluto square, insecurities can seem to emerge out of nowhere, dear Virgo. These might be delayed reactions to recent events if you've been working on autopilot and haven't processed your feelings. Pressures to meet health and work goals may be at the root of tension, as you also want to experiment with new ideas and projects, but can't find the space for all of your pursuits now. Aim to draw on your reserves of self-control and channel your considerable energies into something beneficial to you. As well, consider simplifying things if you've taken on too much. Later today, the Moon heads into your sign for a stay of over two days, and you're starting fresh on an emotional level. You're also coming out of your shell.

Today's Sun-Pluto square can point to concerns or disagreements related to money and power dynamics, sharing, or level of intimacy, dear Libra. If you feel indebted to others in ways that frustrate you, or if someone seems to be relying on you without giving back, it's best to plan how to manage things. Pushing for a quick solution to a complex, long-standing problem can be a lesson in frustration today. Dismissing or rising above a problem area can take a lot of work. However, aim to be selective about what you allow to take center stage in your head right now.

With today's Sun-Pluto square, dear Scorpio, efforts to make peace can end up with you trying to prove yourself, which doesn't help anyone. Messages received today, whether they're verbal or not, appear to be conflicting. People in your life can seem a little controlling. You can become frustrated when an opinion doesn't catch on or is misunderstood, or you might feel particularly restless and ready to take off somewhere "away from it all," only to find yourself emotionally stuck instead. The desire for company is real, but there is a lot to sort out in your inner world, and perhaps a little space is what you need most today. There can be a competitive or tense feel, but through it, seek opportunities to grow and excel. Self-awareness is helpful with difficult energies stirring up fears of losing a position, label, title, or person.

Today's energies can be a little tense in the first half of the day, dear Sagittarius, with a Sun-Pluto square. You may need to work on feeling empowered by living in the here and now. If your daily affairs are getting out of your control, pressures can mount. Avoid overthinking situations, especially if doing so doesn't serve you well. It's not the best time to gain an edge, and there's a real tendency to act compulsively or to create mountains out of molehills. You can be driven to get to the truth of a matter or to find an answer to a problem, but this can come at the cost of time, energy, and perhaps most importantly, spirit. There may be agitation due to communication or transportation delays, but impatience will only exacerbate the problem. Learn from what seems to be triggering your fears or frustrations, but aim to work on getting to a more peaceful, self-kind frame of mind. Even so, it's wise to recognize intense feelings emerging now, not to act upon them, but to observe and learn.

With the Sun in your solar fifth house these days, dear Capricorn, making time for recreation is important. Still, expressing yourself with power and positivity is not as straightforward today with a square between the Sun and Pluto. With this influence, it's not as easy to accept changes or let things go graciously. Money and fundamental values can be tricky topics now. Aim to be flexible and mindful of automatic responses to others or frustrating situations. Otherwise, fears of losing respect or a position can dominate. Trying to force an issue will only lead to frustration today, so consider ways to release tension or resentment productively.

It's a generally strong time to get grounded and centered, dear Aquarius, as you're in a solar cycle that favors refueling and building up your confidence. Today, however, watch for a tendency to magnify or obsess over problems, as the Sun squares Pluto in your sign. Consider that pushing yourself too hard and the resulting stress won't help you. Aim to go easier on yourself. As well, try to avoid power plays and drawing on old, negative patterns of relating. You may want to do things your way, and this might cause some waves. Still, you can move towards a greater understanding of important people in your life and your own emotions if you pay attention.

With today's Sun-Pluto square, dear Pisces, hidden feelings of frustration or guilt can emerge and disrupt the flow until you sort them out. You could feel overwhelmed by the things to do, which prevent you from getting ahead in the areas where your interests truly lie. Dwelling on problems that are beyond your control should be avoided. You are especially sensitive to interruptions, disturbances, and difficult people today, and there can be double meanings in conversations. Aim to focus on solvable problems in the mental or mechanical world to release energy constructively. This way, you give yourself time to cool off.
